ab: Cima kora fa’inayan?
O faki ako cingra.
Cima kora fafahiyan?
O kaka ako cingra.
Cima kora wawa?
O fa’inayan a safa ako cingra.
O manan ko tayal no wina iso?
ch: A:你的媽媽從事什麼工作?

ab: O sufitay cingra.
O manan ko tayal no wama iso?
ch: A:你的爸爸從事什麼工作?

ab: O singsi cingra.
O safa iso to fa’inayan cingra han?
Cowa, o widang no safa ako to fa’inayan cingra.
ch: B:不是，他是我弟弟的朋友。

ab: O kaka iso to fafahiyan cingra han?
Cowa, o safa ako to fafahiyan cingra.
en: No, she is my younger sister.

ab: Papinaay ko paro no loma’ nangra?
en: How many people in their family?

ab: Lalimaay ko paro no loma’ nangra.
en: There are five people in their family.

ab: Papinaay ko wawa no loma’ namo?
en: How many children in your family?

ab: Sasepatay ko wawa niyam.
en: There are four children in our family.

ab: Papinaay ko safa iso to fa’inayan ato fafahiyan?
en: How many younger siblings do you have?

ab: Awaay ko safa ako to fa’inayan, tatoloay ko safa ako to fafahiyan.
ch: B:我沒有弟弟，有三位妹妹。
en: I don’t have any younger brothers, but I have three younger sisters

ab: Papinaay ko kaka iso to fa’inayan ato fafahiyan?
en: How many older siblings do you have?

ab: Awaay ko kaka ako to fa’inayan ato fafahiyan.
en: I don’t have any older siblings.

ab: Papinaay ko salikaka iso?
en: How many siblings do you have?

ab: Awaay ko salikaka ako.
O malikakaay kamo?
Hai, o kaka ako to fa’inayan cingra.
O Yencomin kamo han?
Hai, o Yencomin kami.
O ’Amis cingra han?
Hai, o ’Amis cingra.
